title: Cotton Kharif Brief - Maharashtra
description: Draft a cotton proposal brief for a Kharif trial in Maharashtra.

payload.trial_objective: Increase yield and improve soil structure

title: Paddy Rabi Brief - Telangana
description: Create a paddy trial brief for irrigated farms in Telangana.

payload.trial_objective: Improve water efficiency and tiller count

title: Maize Trial Brief - Karnataka
description: Prepare a maize benchmark brief for a progressive farmers group.

payload.trial_objective: Validate yield uplift and stand uniformity
payload.commercial_notes: Use as comparison case for maize package

title: Soybean Soil Health Brief - Madhya Pradesh
description: Create a soybean-focused brief to test soil health messaging.

payload.trial_objective: Improve root development and moisture retention
payload.commercial_notes: Check compatibility with existing crop inputs

title: Horticulture Trial Brief - Gujarat
description: Build a horticulture brief for orchard soil conditioning.

payload.trial_objective: Improve root zone health and fruit set

title: Review Cotton Proposal v1
description: Approve a cotton proposal with a short comment and validate pricing assumptions.

payload.comments: Commercial assumptions are reasonable. Proceed to pilot.

title: Review Paddy Proposal v2
description: Reject a paddy proposal if dosage or evidence is missing.

payload.comments: Need clearer dosage guidance and field protocol before approval.

title: Review Maize Proposal v3
description: Test reviewer approval after checking citations and governance flags.

payload.comments: Citations are sufficient and governance checks are acceptable.

title: Review Soybean Proposal v4
description: Use this record to validate reviewer login on a second proposal stream.

payload.comments: Good structure. Include farmer-wise implementation notes in final draft.

title: Review Horticulture Proposal v5
description: Flag a high-value crop proposal that needs stronger commercial justification.

payload.comments: ROI assumptions need more evidence for horticulture rollout.

title: Audit Trail Check
description: Confirm brief creation and review actions are visible in the audit trail.

title: Admin Settings Review
description: Check that the current thresholds and feature flags are visible to admin users.

title: Knowledge Base Summary Check
description: Use this to verify indexing metrics after uploads from the sales workflow.

title: Proposal Viewer QA
description: Validate that approved proposals render correctly after admin review checks.

title: Role Access QA
description: Use this record to confirm admin access covers briefs, proposals, reviews, and audit logs.
